blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 57°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
